requirements.description: Agents sharing structural patterns (read code → produce structured findings → validate against schema) MUST use Nunjucks template inheritance (extends/block) from a shared base template
Agents accepting structured input MUST define inputSchema in their .agent.yaml spec — input shape must be declared, not implicit
Agents appearing in 2+ workflows MUST accept parametric input shapes that vary per workflow — identical input wiring across workflows is a composition failure
New template families SHOULD inherit from an existing base template when the structural pattern matches an established family
Agent steps MUST declare output format (format: json) or output schema — no untyped output from agent steps
Base templates MUST exist for each identified structural family before agents in that family can be authored — the composed path must be easier than the flat path
Template task.md files using Nunjucks conditionals (if/for) MUST handle missing input fields gracefully — no silent empty string rendering for required data
